title: Amcor to report Third Quarter 2023 Year to Date Results
text: ZURICH , April 18, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Amcor plc (NYSE: AMCR; ASX: AMC) will announce its year to date results for the nine months ended 31 March 2023 after the US market closes on Tuesday 2 May 2023.   A conference call and webcast to discuss the results will be held at 5.30pm US Eastern Daylight Time on Tuesday 2 May 2023 / 7.30am Australian Eastern Standard Time on Wednesday 3 May 2023.

title: 4 Dividend Aristocrat Buys For April + 2 To Watch
text: "Dividend Aristocrats in the S&P 500 Index have raised their annual payouts every year for at least 25 consecutive years." - Kiplinger.com/Investing. 67 Aristocrats, screened as of April 5, 2023, represented all eleven Morningstar Sectors. Broker estimated top ten net gains ranged from 14.14%-42.97% topped by SWK & VFC.
